name: fs-read
description: Read-only filesystem access jailed to a single base directory. Supports readFile, listDir, and stat. Defaults to a temp directory if unconfigured.

hints.overview: Read files from the jailed base directory. All paths are relative to baseDir.
criticalRules: All paths are relative to baseDir — absolute paths become relative
Per-call limit: 1MB — use readFileChunk for larger files
Text functions return {error}, binary functions THROW
commonPatterns: Read text: const result = readFile('data.json'); if (result.error) ...
Read binary: try { const bytes = readFileBinary('image.png') } catch (e) { ... }
List directory: const entries = listDir('.') // [{name, type}]
